description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs nightly at 2am, on every pull request to any branch, and on push to the master branch or any tag. The workflow has three jobs: windows, windows2022, and mac, each running on a different environment (windows-2019, windows-2022, and macos-10.15 respectively). Each job checks out the code, installs Doxygen, Python 3.8, numpy, and SWIG, caches dependencies, builds and tests opensim-core, and uploads the resulting package as an artifact.
